summary: Completed frontend testing of dashboard redesign with blue theme. All major features working correctly including Add Transaction button placement, stats cards layout, settings modal with user preferences, and view mode functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal backdrop intercepts pointer events preventing clicks on underlying elements
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True in clicks or click outside modal to close

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with clean blue theme (gradient from slate-50 via blue-50 to indigo-50)
Add Transaction button prominently placed at top with blue styling (bg-blue-600)
Stats cards display inline next to Add Transaction button (Income, Maaser, Balance, Given)
Settings modal opens successfully with all user preferences
Default View setting dropdown works (all_time, year, month options)
Distribution Mode buttons work (Give & Lend, Give Only)
View mode buttons functional (All Time, Year, Month)
Add Transaction modal opens with proper form fields
User authentication and session management working
All required test IDs present and functional
